channel.title: Transcripts: Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)
channel.description: YouTube video transcripts from Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)

item.title: Raging Perspective LIVE w/ Jessica Tarlov & Aaron Parnas
item.description:
Join Jessica Tarlov and Aaron Parnas (@aaronparnas1) for Raging Perspective: the weekly politics live show, keeping you informed with all the latest news — and not holding back when it makes us rage.
To see Raging Perspective LIVE, and to get ad-free episodes of Raging Moderates and all the other Prof G shows: join ProfG+ on Substack: https://ragingmoderates.profgmedia.com/ Get The Monday Rage newsletter: https://profgmedia.com/s/monday-rage/
Follow Jessica Tarlov on Instagram, Substack, and Bluesky: https://instagram.com/jessicatarlov https://substack.com/@jessietarlov https://bsky.app/profile/jessicatarlov.bsky.social
Follow Aaron Parnas on Substack, TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube: https://aaronparnas.substack.com/ https://www.tiktok.com/@aaronparnas1/ https://instagram.com/aaronparnas/ https://www.youtube.com/@aaronparnas1
Follow Raging Moderates on IG, Tiktok, and Facebook: https://www.instagram.com/ragingmoderatespod/ https://www.tiktok.com/@ragingmoderates https://www.facebook.com/ragingmoderates
Subscribe to our YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RagingModerates
#trump #uspolitics #politics #aaronparnas #jessicatarlov #republicans #gop #republicanparty #democrats #democraticparty #livestream
